title: Title a market-sizing slide with the so-what
guidance: Reward a claim about whether the market is big/growing enough to matter. Penalise the label 'Market size'.

runner_input.instruction: Write the slide title as the takeaway of the numbers.

source_blocks.text: Chart: SAM £271m, growing 9% YoY; incumbents 60% share but on-premise and low-NPS.

rubric_notes: Good title says the market is big and displaceable, e.g. 'A £271m SAM held by stale incumbents is ripe for a cloud challenger.'
